name: knowledge-os
description: Company knowledge system: Markdown as the source of truth + a standalone offline HTML viewer. /kb-* commands to create, sync, ingest, query, stats, onboard projects and deploy a knowledge base. Hierarchical index + always-on core context (CONTEXT.md/now.md) that stays fast at scale. Zones for projects, skills, people, meetings & concepts. Tool-agnostic (Claude Code, Codex, Antigravity).
